sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Stack-Up article (developer credits: Hirokazu Tanaka for sound engine, build date 5/5/1985)
notes: Limited music documentation available. Only composer information (Hirokazu Tanaka) and sound engine build date extracted from hidden ROM text. No tempo, key, chord progression, or SFX characteristic data documented in provided sources. Game is R.O.B. series title designed for robot accessory gameplay rather than traditional music-focused experience.
